name: get_paper_info
description: Load a curated paper information JSON record from the construction_file_tools data directory. Supports both v1 and v2 schemas. Returns normalized fields (targets, vectors, enzymes, assembly_method, delivery_method, validation_methods, key_constraints, notes) so downstream tools can operate consistently. v2 records may additionally include structured oligo_information (explicit_sequences and design_rules).

inputs.name: paper_id
inputs.description: Unique identifier for the paper. The tool will search for files named <paper_id>.json or <paper_id>_v2.json in modules/crispr_tools/data/paper_info/.

outputs.description: Structured paper information with normalized fields. Always includes core fields (paper_id, title, organism, system, targets, vectors, enzymes, assembly_method, delivery_method, validation_methods, key_constraints, notes). May additionally include oligo_information if available.
